items.name_en: [Highest Version, Factory Leather, Top-tier Original, Full Counter Packaging] Medium Dior Toujours Vertical Bag
items.name_cn:
[Highest Version, Factory Leather, Top-tier Original, Full Counter Packaging] Medium Dior Toujours Vertical Bag
8806
Black Calfskin Oversized Wicker Weave
Number: M2836OSNW_
This Dior Toujours vertical bag is stylish, practical, and unique. Crafted from black calfskin and adorned with oversized wicker weave stitching, it features a spacious interior compartment for various daily essentials. It features a fine leather drawstring closure for secure storage, along with a CD Lock letter D turn-knob clasp that adjusts on both sides to elevate the style. The medium size comes with a top leather handle and a detachable leather shoulder strap, allowing for hand-carry, shoulder, or crossbody wear.
Main Material: Calfskin
Lining: Calfskin
Double Opening: Fine drawstring and Christian Dior Paris drawstring with CD Lock clasp
D.I.O.R. Charm
Internal card slot
Top leather handle
Detachable leather shoulder strap
Includes dust bag
Size: 20 x 22 x 18.5 cm (L x H x W)
Fits 2 wallets, 1 phone, 2 card holders, sunglasses, and lipstick

items.name_en: [LV x TM Marellini Handbag] M13099 Black, M13100 White (Three Colors - Murakami)
items.name_cn:
[LV x TM Marellini Handbag] M13099 Black, M13100 White (Three Colors - Murakami)
This Marellini handbag is crafted from richly textured Epi leather to create a refined silhouette, offering ample space to store daily essentials like smartphones. The round coin purse and mirror are made of colorful Monogram canvas from the Louis Vuitton x Takashi Murakami collaboration series and are secured to the bag body with rugged metal chains.
Size: 13.5 x 6.5 x 19 cm

specs.rawTitle:

items.name_en: [Original Leather] This classic Stark backpack features the iconic Visetos pattern and Nappa leather, a pioneer in the daily luxury field. Multi-faceted rivets outline the silhouette of the bag, embodying MCM's unique rebellious spirit. The bag features an outer pocket, a front zip pocket, and an internal compartment for tablets and small electronics, showcasing modern functionality that complements its contemporary look. Size: Actual photo small approx 13.0 x 26.0 x 33.0 cm; Medium approx 33.5 x 42.5 x 16.0 cm
